candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; clearly represents total revenue/sales.
This is cost of sales, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
This is an operating expense, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; rejected for REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue; rejected for REVT.
Net finance result, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Tax item, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Bottom-line result including OCI, not revenue; rejected for REVT.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue; rejected for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Bottom-line measure, not top-line revenue; rejected for REVT.
Balance sheet asset, not the revenue flow; rejected for REVT.
Represents direct costs of providing services; best match for cost of goods/services sold.
Likely service-related cost but appears as a separate older-period line; secondary candidate if direct costs were missing.
General payroll; more SG&A-like than direct COGS for this mapping, so not chosen for COGS.
Overhead/operating expenses; fits SG&A better than COGS.
Transaction-related, not direct production costs; rejected for COGS.
Credit loss expense, not direct production cost; rejected for COGS.
Mixed other operating item, not direct COGS; rejected.
Aggregate operating expenses including D&A; too broad for pure COGS.
Financial, not operating cost of sales; rejected.
Result from discontinued ops, not COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not COGS flow; rejected.
Typical SG&A-type overhead; good core SG&A component.
Mixed operating income/expense line; not a pure SG&A component, so excluded per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Restructuring cost and other non-recurring items

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Selected multiple operating overhead components (personnel, share-based comp, sales & marketing, other operating, restructuring, acquisition-related, inventory/equipment handling, and bad debts) as SG&A. Excluded COGS, depreciation/amortization, impairments, taxes, interest, and totals, in line with SG&A rules. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and related expenses, [Income Statement] Share based compensation, [Income Statement] Restructuring cost and other non-recurring items, [Income Statement] Expenses related to acquisitions, [Income Statement] Sales and marketing cost, [Income Statement] Inventory and equipment, [Income Statement] Bad debts expense
No explicit research & development-related line items are present in the provided statements; treating XRD as absent (0).

candidates.why: Explicit net interest expense line; primary measure of interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; good backup if main net interest line missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense financial institutions and other
candidates.why: Specific interest expense on financial institutions and others; strong direct interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful lower-priority fallback.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not used as primary XINT but informative for netting within reported lines.
Other interest-related income/expenses; can capture residual interest effects if primary lines are missing.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not an interest line; excluded for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense financial institutions and other
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list of interest expense lines, preferring specific gross expense lines, then net interest, then supplemental/other interest-related items.

candidates.why: Label explicitly refers to shareholders’ equity; appears as an owner-equity line but with limited-year data.
Main multi-year line for shareholders’ equity attributable to owners; best representation of book equity excluding any NCI.
Total equity equals shareholders’ equity here, with no separate minority interest line; acceptable fallback but less specific than shareholders’ equity labels.
Technical balancing row, not the actual equity measure; rejected.
Balancing row, not the primary equity line; rejected.
Balance sheet total, not pure equity; rejected.

variables.notes: Using the shareholders’ equity lines that explicitly refer to owners’ equity. Total Equity is redundant and not needed given these more specific labels; no separate non-controlling interests line is present.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Describes income before minority interest, not the minority interest balance itself; not suitable for mapping MIB.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for non-controlling/minority interests is present; MIB is treated as 0.
